# Syntax.Source

<!-- Generated by `prism docs` from `lib/std/Syntax/Source.pr`. Do not edit by hand. -->

Source identity for the versioned syntax artifacts: byte spans and source files. A span is a half-open byte range into one source text; byte offsets are the canonical position vocabulary (line and column are projections for people, never a second identity). The compiler emits these in the `prism-syntax-tokens-v1` and `prism-surface-syntax-v1` exports; this module is the Prism-side vocabulary those artifacts decode into.

## Types

### `Span`

```prism,def,h-6a155edb15bb7d091a37c6d724d55856632c322d11fb55ba01733a23b96f39d2
type Span = Span { lo: Int, hi: Int } deriving (Eq, Show)
```

A half-open byte range `[lo, hi)` into one source text.

```prism,mod=Syntax.Source
span_len(Span { lo = 3, hi = 8 })
```

```output
5
```

### `SourceFile`

```prism,def,h-f22e5dbd4b7b5e8d8e7e15312d340e1169acc9af77f18511225dc5306f32782b
type SourceFile = SourceFile { digest: String, text: String } deriving (Eq)
```

One source file as an artifact embeds it: the exact text and its digest. Every span in an artifact indexes this text, so a persisted document needs no external file.

## Functions and Values

### `span_len`

```prism,sig,h-63244643676b3a3a04a0d642d191372c3978bd542025d2bd440f9a37532f6053
span_len : (Syntax.Source.Span) -> Int
```

The number of bytes a span covers.

### `span_valid`

```prism,sig,h-e655cdb8dc961e8b145a0bb85b74d824f33a80bcfbc0f738353ce033cd5476d3
span_valid : (Syntax.Source.Span) -> Bool
```

Whether a span is well formed: non-negative start, start at or before end.

```prism,mod=Syntax.Source
(span_valid(Span { lo = 2, hi = 2 }), span_valid(Span { lo = 5, hi = 4 }))
```

```output
(true, false)
```

### `span_contains`

```prism,sig,h-6f21d9b9af8d21a118fdbb94c86ff8edf1370ed2eb932db7d505a8e5d0fac1c5
span_contains : (Syntax.Source.Span, Int) -> Bool
```

Whether a byte offset falls inside the span (half-open, so the end offset is outside).

### `line_col`

```prism,sig,h-3537a9d834ce670ec441152750eb41c0d34ccfa42a7f883cf2efd683f0acbcdb
line_col : (String, Int) -> (Int, Int)
```

The one-based line and column of a byte offset, as a projection over the text. Offsets past the end clamp to the final position.

```prism,mod=Syntax.Source
line_col("ab\ncd", 4)
```

```output
(2, 2)
```
